languages.text: "Вы не узнаете здесь секретов. Лишь чистую истину".
"You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."
languages.original_text: "Вы не узнаете здесь секретов. Лишь чистую истину".

traits.locale_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."
"You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."
"You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

languages.text: “你在这儿挖不到什么秘密。只有纯粹的真相。”
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: “你在这儿挖不到什么秘密。只有纯粹的真相。”

languages.text: « Vous n'apprendrez aucun secret ici, uniquement la pure vérité. »
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'apprendrez aucun secret ici, uniquement la pure vérité. »

languages.text: "Benden gizli saklı şeyler duymayacaksınız. Sadece saf gerçeği öğreneceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: "Benden gizli saklı şeyler duymayacaksınız. Sadece saf gerçeği öğreneceksiniz."

languages.text: «Aquí no descubrirá ningún secreto, tan solo la pura verdad».
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: «Aquí no descubrirá ningún secreto, tan solo la pura verdad».

languages.text: "Ihr werdet hier keine Geheimnisse erfahren. Nur die reine Wahrheit."
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr werdet hier keine Geheimnisse erfahren. Nur die reine Wahrheit."

languages.text: 「ここには秘密は教えられません。純粋な真実のみが教えられます。」
languages.original_text: "You will learn no secrets here. Only the pure truth."

traits.locale_text: 「ここには秘密は教えられません。純粋な真実のみが教えられます。」
